title: GitHub Advanced Security Part 1 of 2
summary: Learn how to secure your code with advanced security features at every stage of your development lifecycle. GitHub Advanced Security is an add-on to GitHub Enterprise that allows you to use security features, such as secret scanning, code scanning, and dependency management on your private repositories.

sections.title: GitHub Advanced Security Part 1 of 2
sections.summary: Learn how to secure your code with advanced security features at every stage of your development lifecycle. GitHub Advanced Security is an add-on to GitHub Enterprise that allows you to use security features, such as secret scanning, code scanning, and dependency management on your private repositories.

lessons.title: Introduction to GitHub Advanced Security
lessons.content_md:
This module will help you become familiar with GitHub's Advanced Security features and best practices. As you learn about these features, you'll identify critical areas for eliminating security gaps.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-github-advanced-security/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Configure Dependabot security updates on your GitHub repo
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to configure Dependabot security updates on your GitHub repo.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-dependabot-security-updates-on-github-repo/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Configure Dependabot security updates on your GitHub repo

lessons.title: Configure and use secret scanning in your GitHub repository
lessons.content_md:
On completing this module, you'll understand how secret scanning works to configure and use it efficiently.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-use-secret-scanning-github-repository/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Configure and use secret scanning in your GitHub repository

lessons.title: Configure code scanning on GitHub
lessons.content_md:
This module introduces you to code scanning and its features. You'll learn how to implement code scanning using CodeQL, third party tools, and GitHub Actions.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-code-scanning/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica GitHub Advanced Security Part 1 of 2
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **GitHub Advanced Security Part 1 of 2**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
